excerpt: In a remote country house, a religious zealot confines her dead son’s fiancée to an attic prison.
title: Die! Die! My Darling!

excerpt: Lawman Sean Connery arrives on a mining rig on one of Jupiter’s moons and uncovers a conspiracy.
title: Outland

excerpt: A London constable finds himself transported to a ravaged future where the merciless Daleks have enslaved humanity.
title: Daleks' Invasion Earth 2150 A.D.

excerpt: Angela poses as an inner-city teen to return to the rebranded camp from the prior film where she resumes killing.
title: Sleepaway Camp III: Teenage Wasteland

excerpt: Angela, a gleefully homicidal camp counselor, punishes misbehaving campers in increasingly over-the-top fashions.
title: Sleepaway Camp II: Unhappy Campers
